name: lucid-fin
description: Lucid Fin – AI Movie Production Tool
author: Lucid Fin Team

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspaces --if-present && npm run build:dev --workspace=apps/desktop-renderer && npm run dev --workspace=apps/desktop-main
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/contracts && npm run build --workspace=packages/storage --workspace=packages/adapters-ai --workspace=packages/domain --workspace=packages/media-engine && npm run build --workspace=packages/application && npm run build --workspace=apps/desktop-renderer && npm run build --workspace=apps/desktop-main
scripts.test:coverage:critical: vitest run --root apps/desktop-main src/logger.test.ts src/startup-metrics.test.ts src/electron.startup.test.ts src/llm-provider-runtime.test.ts src/bootstrap/init-app.test.ts src/ipc/handlers/canvas-generation.handlers.test.ts src/ipc/handlers/commander.handlers.logging.test.ts src/ipc/handlers/commander-meta.handlers.test.ts src/ipc/handlers/workflow.handlers.test.ts src/ipc/handlers/job.handlers.test.ts --coverage
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run pack --workspace=apps/desktop-main
